name: U.A. Libero Spiker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウルトラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リベロスパイカー
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Libero Spiker". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Libero Spiker" once per turn this way. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can shuffle 1 Level 5 or higher "U.A." monster from your hand into the Deck, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "U.A." monster from your Deck with a different name, then return this card to the hand. You can only use this effect of "U.A. Libero Spiker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Libero Spiker". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Libero Spiker" once per turn this way. You can only use this effect of "U.A. Libero Spiker" once per turn.

action: Returns from field to hand for Special Summon
Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns itself from field to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
